title: Geo-BTC: Bitcoin Price Forecasting with LSTM and Residual Analysis for Geopolitical Risk Inference
description: Reproducible research pipeline combining a univariate LSTM forecast of daily BTC/USD closing prices (Bitstamp exchange, 2012-2014 training) with a two-sigma residual-analysis procedure that flags candidate dates in 2015 for downstream qualitative investigation of geopolitically significant events.
